summary: WoW addon with Ace3 bootstrap, .pkgmeta packaging, luacheck
description: World of Warcraft addon: .toc manifest, Ace3 bootstrap (AceAddon, AceConsole, AceEvent), BigWigsMods packager metadata (.pkgmeta), luacheck config. Libraries resolve at package time via .pkgmeta externals; for local play-testing copy Ace3 into Libs/.
post_scaffold_notes: Update '## Interface:' in {name}.toc to the current client build.
Copy LibStub, CallbackHandler-1.0, and Ace3 into Libs/ for local testing (see Libs/README.md).
Run the project-setup skill to tailor lua instruction files.
